description: CompositionHalf sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has bold purple and black checks with grey accents, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, patch pockets on the chest with buttoned closures, full length buttoned placket with tri-colour buttons, brand name appliqued on the top of the left pocket and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this  purple and black check shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
